name: Mozi

skills.name: Fight for Peace
skills.description: Every 4th Basic Attack deals area damage and knocks back enemies. Gains shield stacks when using skills, for up to 3 stacks.

skills.name: Peacebringer
skills.description: Dashes in the target direction, dealing damage to enemies along the way. The next Basic Attack is enhanced, becoming Fight for Peace.

skills.name: Cannon Blast
skills.description: Fires a shell in the target direction, stunning and dealing AoE damage to the 1st enemy hit. The shell leaves a crater in the ground after reaching its max range or hitting an enemy, dealing damage over time to enemies that step init.

skills.name: Think Inside the Box
skills.description: Deals continuous damage to enemies within a certain range of himself, stunning enemies every time he deals damage.

tips: Mozi is a Medium Mage (Mid Lane) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier S with 50.0% win rate and 1.2% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
Best build path: Boots of Tranquility → Holy Grail → Mask of Agony → Scepter of Reverberation → Savant's Wrath → Void Staff.
Run Nightmare for stats that match Mozi's Mage kit. Take Flash — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
Standard trade: Peacebringer → Cannon Blast → Think Inside the Box → weave basic attacks. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for passive value.
Laning: Control first wave without taking free poke. Roam after pushing wave 2–4 to side lanes with your jungler.
Teamfight: Poke from max range before objective. Save hard CC for enemy dive or your carry peel window.
Mozi excels into Cirrus, Lam, Li Bai. Avoid blind picking into Dolia, Guiguzi, Nezha without team peel.
Mozi is a Tier S staple in high-elo (Diamond+) on the international server — worth mastering for climb. Ban rate 1.1% — expect Mozi to be removed in tryhard lobbies; have a backup in the same role.

faqs.question: Is Mozi good in the current meta?
faqs.answer: Mozi is Tier S Mage with 50.0% win rate, 1.2% pick rate, and 1.1% ban rate on Honor of Kings Global (Camp HOK, 2026-06-05). Strong meta pick for ranked.

faqs.question: What is the best Mozi build?
faqs.answer: Core item path: Boots of Tranquility, Holy Grail, Mask of Agony, Scepter of Reverberation, Savant's Wrath, Void Staff. Run Nightmare arcana with Flash. Switch to alternate build presets on this page for jungle, clash, or late-game setups.

faqs.question: How to counter Mozi?
faqs.answer: Pick Dolia, Guiguzi, Nezha into Mozi. Deny Mid Lane resources early and force fights before Mozi completes core items. Mozi struggles when the enemy can out-range or out-sustain them.

faqs.question: Who does Mozi counter?
faqs.answer: Mozi is strong into Cirrus, Lam, Li Bai according to HoKStats matchup data and role matchups on the global server. Draft Mozi when the enemy relies on these heroes in the Mid Lane lane.

faqs.question: Is Mozi good in high rank / Diamond+?
faqs.answer: Mozi is a Tier S staple in high-elo (Diamond+) on the international server — worth mastering for climb. Ban rate 1.1% — expect Mozi to be removed in tryhard lobbies; have a backup in the same role.

faqs.question: What lane should Mozi play?
faqs.answer: Mozi is tagged Mid Lane in Camp export (Mage, Fighter). Control first wave without taking free poke. Roam after pushing wave 2–4 to side lanes with your jungler.

faqs.question: Best arcana and spells for Mozi?
faqs.answer: Recommended: Nightmare arcana. Battle spell: Flash. Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive and jungle need.

faqs.question: Mozi or Daji — which is better?
faqs.answer: Mozi vs Daji (Mage, Tier S+): Daji is 2.4% pick / 51.0% WR. Daji wins 1.1% more often globally. Choose Mozi when you need Mid Lane identity; choose Daji for Mid Lane comfort.

faqs.question: Should I ban Mozi?
faqs.answer: Yes in tryhard queues — 1.1% ban rate. Deny if enemy first-picks Mage.
